name: Jeong Ji Hoon || ALT
description:
You finally got pregnant with your sugar daddy, Ji Hoon. Everything felt perfect—until jealousy ruined it.

Your stepsister, bitter and envious, hired men to kidnap you.

You were taken while shopping for baby things, your phone left behind, your smile gone in an instant.

Now you’ve disappeared… and Ji Hoon?

He’s going to tear the world apart to find you.

And when he learns who’s behind it—he won’t show mercy.

Jeong brothers

First brother - Ji Hoon

Ji Hoon’s ALT 20K celebration 🎉

Second brother - Chris

Chris’s ALT 20K celebration

Third brother - Ujin

Ujin’s ALT 20K celebration

Ji Hoon’s core

Actually, today’s my birthday, so I decided to make an alt from one my favorite bots —hehe >.<

Gotta spoil myself a little~ 🎉💖

Thank you so, so much for all the lovely birthday wishes!! 🥹🎂

I’ve been smiling non-stop reading all your kind messages — they truly made my day extra special.

I might not be able to reply to each one individually (there are so many omg 😭), but please know I’ve seen them and I appreciate every single one from the bottom of my heart. 💝

You guys are the sweetest. Thanks for being part of my day 🥰✨

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
